name: Tenki Sandbox
description: OpenClaw sandbox backend for Tenki Cloud with remote workspace execution over SSH.

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: Sandbox mode. Use mirror for the default local-workspace flow or remote for a fully remote workspace.

command.label: Tenki Command
command.help: Path or command name for the Tenki CLI.

gateway.label: Gateway Name
gateway.help: Optional Tenki gateway name passed as --gateway.

gatewayEndpoint.label: Gateway Endpoint
gatewayEndpoint.help: Optional Tenki gateway endpoint passed as --gateway-endpoint.

from.label: Sandbox Source
from.help: Tenki sandbox source for first-time create. Defaults to openclaw.

policy.label: Policy File
policy.help: Optional path to a custom Tenki sandbox policy YAML.

providers.label: Providers
providers.help: Provider names to attach when a sandbox is created.

gpu.label: GPU
gpu.help: Request GPU resources when creating the sandbox.

autoProviders.label: Auto-create Providers
autoProviders.help: When enabled, pass --auto-providers during sandbox create.

remoteWorkspaceDir.label: Remote Workspace Dir
remoteWorkspaceDir.help: Primary writable workspace inside the Tenki sandbox.

remoteAgentWorkspaceDir.label: Remote Agent Dir
remoteAgentWorkspaceDir.help: Mirror path for the real agent workspace when workspaceAccess is read-only.

timeoutSeconds.label: Command Timeout Seconds
timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout for tenki CLI operations such as create/upload/download.
